name: autonomous-os-kernel
description: Autonomous Agentic Operating System Kernel — a scalable, modular, observable, multi-agent, multi-service factory kernel.

scripts.build:deps: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @factory/service-kit run build
scripts.dev: echo 'Run a specific service: pnpm --filter <service> run dev'
scripts.dev:all: pnpm run build:deps && concurrently -k -n registry,events,gateway,orch,arch,build,devops,memory,docs,assets,monitor,browser,dash -c blue,cyan,green,magenta,yellow,red,white,gray,blueBright,greenBright,cyanBright,magentaBright,whiteBright "pnpm --filter @factory/service-registry run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/event-bus-service run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/gateway-api run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/orchestrator-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/architect-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/builder-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/devops-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/memory-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/documentation-service run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/file-asset-service run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/monitor-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/browser-testing-agent run dev" "pnpm --filter @factory/dashboard-web run dev"
